testsuite.name: TestParser
testsuite.system-out: Token à Parser : TOKEN<MOT_CLEF,INT,0,1,> TOKEN<IDENTIFIANT,i,0,5,> TOKEN<EGAL_ASSIGNATION,=,0,7,> TOKEN<INT,3,0,9,> TOKEN<POINT_VIRGULE,;,0,10,> TOKEN<MOT_CLEF,final,0,11,> TOKEN<MOT_CLEF,FLOAT,0,17,> TOKEN<IDENTIFIANT,j,0,23,> TOKEN<EGAL_ASSIGNATION,=,0,25,> TOKEN<FLOAT,3.2,0,27,> TOKEN<MULTIPLICATION,*,0,31,> TOKEN<FLOAT,5.0,0,33,> [VarDeclStmt Type(INT) Identifier(i) AssignmentOperator(=) IntLiteral(3), VarDeclStmt(final) Type(FLOAT) Identifier(j) AssignmentOperator(=) ExprBinaire Float(3.2) OperatorCalcul(*) Float(5.0)]
